description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind Lint that runs on push and pull requests to the development branch, specifically for files in cmake, amr-wind, submods, test, unit_tests, CMakeLists.txt, and .github/workflows/lint.yml. Use a macos-latest job to cancel previous runs, check out the repository with submodules, install cppcheck dependencies, configure the build, perform static analysis with cppcheck, and report warnings.
